title: A white light UFO spotted by a piltot during a flight near Petrolina [2000]

text_preview:
APRIL 4th, 2000. Time: 20h20pm. Duration: 1 minute. A pilot from NES – Nordeste Linhas Aéreas and another witness, when flying near the city of Petrolina, State of Pernambuco, saw an unidentified flying object in the form of a white light. The object, according to the pilot, had the appearance of a “trafficlight”, moving just above 18,000ft in altitude and about 40NM [nautical miles] away from the NES plane.

Observations in the COMDABRA [Brazilian Aerospace Defense Command] report state that: “The pilot requested confirmation of traffic in the vicinity of his aircraft, as he observed the fact
summary: A NES airline pilot and co-witness near Petrolina saw a white traffic-light-like UFO at 18,000ft that vanished after ~1 minute with no other radar traffic.
